policy.reason: Iteration 4 already pivoted away from MGCD/DSG. Phase 1 schedules only the new screening tasks needed to compare cand_bsr_v1 and cand_espd fairly before any conditional extension.
forbidden_work: full benchmark scheduling before phase1 signal
running cand_ugr before BSR or ESPD shows signal

candidate_priority.activation_rule: Run in phase 1 as the only quality-first candidate, but freeze it as cand_bsr_v1 before pilot execution.
Run in phase 1 as the speed-first line under the same runtime contract and with a fixed-frontier sham control.
Do not schedule in phase 1. Only activate if cand_bsr_v1 or cand_espd shows real signal.

pilot_config.budget_policy: quality must be reported at equal compute; speed must be reported at equal quality band
runtime_requirements: probe max-safe batch size before formal runs
prefer flash_attention_2, otherwise log matched fallback
compile parity across candidates and controls

bsr_pass: cand_bsr_v1 beats RAND-84 on the GSM8K confirm split
At least one BSR sham control fails to match the gain
Harm containment improves rather than simply expanding rewrites
espd_pass: cand_espd shows clear speed gain under the unified runtime contract
Quality does not collapse against RAND-84
ESPD-FixedFrontier cannot explain the same gain
phase2_activation: Only trigger MBPP or UGR if bsr_pass or espd_pass is satisfied
overall_no_go: If both cand_bsr_v1 and cand_espd fail to show signal, return to idea_debate instead of launching any full benchmark

full_scale_trigger.rule: Instantiate full benchmark tasks only after idea_validation_decision selects a surviving candidate from the new pool.
requirements: candidate-specific multi-GPU review at full scale
